name: Lint Run
description: Run the project's configured linter(s) and return structured findings. Auto-detects ESLint, Prettier, Pylint, golangci-lint, etc. from project config.

parameters.name: paths
parameters.description: Files or directories to lint. Defaults to entire project.

parameters.name: rules
parameters.description: Only check specific rules (linter-specific rule IDs)

outputDescription: Object with {findings: [{file, line, column, severity, ruleId, message, fix?}], totalErrors, totalWarnings, fixedCount}.
author: openspace
